macro.title: S&P 500 rises to new record as investors move past Iran conflict concerns: Live updates - CNBC
macro.summary: The S&P 500 ended Tuesday's session less than 1% from its all-time high set on Jan. 28.

macro.title: Stock Market Today: S&P 500 on Track for Closing High - Barron's
macro.summary: The Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq are mixed Wednesday as technology leads the stock market rally. The S&P 500 is on track for a record.

macro.title: Disney’s Massive Layoffs Have Seemingly Hit Marvel Hard - Gizmodo
macro.summary: About 1,000 people are facing layoffs at Disney—with Marvel Studios reportedly facing big cuts that include almost wiping out its visual development team.

macro.title: Why AST SpaceMobile Could Buy Iridium, Viasat Spectrum To Counter Amazon's Globalstar Deal - Investor's Business Daily
macro.summary: AST SpaceMobile could fire back at Amazon's proposed acquisition of Globalstar by targeting Viasat or Iridium spectrum assets, analysts say.

macro.title: Anti-AI groups distance themselves from violence in wake of Sam Altman attack - NBC News
macro.summary: Activist groups are disavowing violence after a person with anti-AI views was accused of attacking Sam Altman’s San Francisco home with a Molotov cocktail.
